title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO WALANG BALAHIBO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO BARRIO SAN ISIDRO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11821 / 62 OG No. 27, 4750 (July 4, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4332, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO WALANG BALAHIBO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO BARRIO SAN ISIDRO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Walang Balahibo in the Municipality of Lemery, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Barrio San Isidro.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
